creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text:
Yuri, in the binutils bug report you mentioned that the raw symbol was truncated.

Does the elftoolchain c++filt work correctly with the non-truncated symbol, or does it also assert?

That said, it would be nicer if both the binutils and elftoolchain demangling tools showed an error message "your symbol is invalid, because xxxx" instead. :)
